creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

I have ran it many times with the different combines of OPTIONS and I can't 
reproduce it. Even with your same OPTIONS: 

WITH_AA=true 
WITH_DBUS=true 
WITH_EXIF=true 
WITH_GVFS=true 
WITH_HELPBROWSER=true 
WITH_MNG=true 
WITH_MP=true 
WITHOUT_POPPLER=true 
WITH_RSVG=true 
WITH_SIMD=true 
WITH_WMF=true 

Since we have 2.6.12 in ports tree and your report was 2.6.11. It's very 
possible that it's already fixed in 2.6.12. I am going to close this PR. If 
you are able to figure how to reproduce it in 2.6.12, please feel free to 
file a new PR.
